debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
g : V → U
h : g ∘ f = id
⊢ image g ∘ image f = id

proof:
by
  funext S x
  apply propext
  constructor
  · intro ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, hfy⟩, hgx⟩
    rw [← hgx, ← hfy, show g (f z) = z from congr_fun h z]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩
successful_attempts:
by
  funext S x
  apply propext
  constructor
  · intro ⟨y, ⟨z, hz, hfy⟩, hgx⟩
    rw [← hgx, ← hfy, show g (f z) = z from congr_fun h z]
    exact hz
  · intro hx
    exact ⟨f x, ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩, congr_fun h x⟩
